creator: soralx@cydem.org
text:

How-To-Repeat: 	Install glchess either from ports or the latest one from gnome-games, startx with 'nvidia' driver, exec `glchess`. It used to work nicely in the times of 6.1-RC, AFAIR. It can easily be that something is not right with python...
